case_title: HOLLIER, SABRINA D. VS COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY HOLLIER, SABRINA D. AS TO DEFENDANT COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-05-2006 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOLLIER, SABRINA D. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS AMENDED TO ADD COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP. DEFENDANT LUIS MENDOZA IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS IMPROPERLY NAMED AS A PARTY. COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP APPEARED, WAIVED SERVICE OF PROCESS AND NOTICE OF TRIAL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
